texto: Take hands.There is no love now.But there are hands.There is no joining now,But a joining has beenOf the fastening of fingersAnd their opening.More than the clasp even, the kissSpeaks loneliness,How we dwell apart,And how love triumphs in this.
explicacao: Citação de Laura Riding Jackson sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Take hands.There is no love now.But there are hands.There is no joining now,But a joining has bee…” articula amor, loneliness, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como love e poetry.
